I am a 3rd-year PhD student in the Department of Computer Science at University Name, where I am fortunate to be advised by 

Prof. Sarah M Brown. I completed my BS in combined Mathematics and Computer Science at University of Bamenda in Cameroon (2023). I am a carpentry instructor teaching computational data analysis skills to researchers.
